{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Pioneer world six thousand twenty-four
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pioneer world six thousand twenty-four]] is a source of food and materials untouched by the [[Collapse]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Pioneer world six thousand twenty-four,” Eithan introduced. “Miraculously untouched by the Collapse, it remains a source of food and materials that we can’t harvest from any world with a stable connection to the Way.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
